chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-3445 of 2011 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- For hearing of main case. 21.02.2025 Mr.Naveed Ahmed Khan, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Khalid Rapar, Advocate for the Respondent (F.B.R) Learned counsel for the petitioner states that he will make an application to agitate his grievance before the concerned Department, which may be heard and decided after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. Learned counsel for Respondent (F.B.R) has no cavil to the aforesaid and states this petition may be disposed of in such terms. Oder accordingly. Judge Judge NASIR
